name: peterokase42--dont-hack-me
description: 別駭我！基本安全檢測 — Security self-check for Clawdbot/Moltbot. Run a quick audit of your clawdbot.json to catch dangerous misconfigurations — exposed gateway, missing auth, open DM policy, weak tokens, loose file permissions. Auto-fix included. Invoke: "run a security check" or "幫我做安全檢查".
